message:
feat(freeze): Enable C builder API by default

Enable use_builder_api=true in frozen_registry.zig to use the structured
CBuilder API for exception/error check helpers.

Tested with both fib and loop benchmarks - performance unchanged:
- fib(45): 23.22ms AOT (was 23.84ms)
- loop sumArray: 0.11ms AOT (unchanged)

The builder API is now active for all freeze codegen. Currently only
emitExceptionCheck() and emitErrorCheck() use the builder, but this
provides the foundation for migrating more opcodes incrementally.
